splits.label: Prologue
splits.note: Block you fool, after prologue, do haiku. Photomode.

splits.label: Golden Temple Runs
splits.note:
Ride south to unlock Golden Summit, Hot Springs and Fox Den.
Ariake Bamboo, Forest Hot Springs, Fox, Shinto Shrine.
FT Golden Summit Hot Springs and clear the Golden Summit Shrine.
FT Island Haiku and ride into Kashine Forest for the Fox Den(bow at shrine for hidden altar) before touching Yuna.

splits.label: Yuna
splits.note: Start of the mission Hidden Altar. Get mongol scroll and artefact during mission.

splits.label: Northen Area Cleanup
splits.note:
Inari Shrine where mission ends, Hotsprings,(Bear by the river, fighting with Bandit).
Beach Inari shrine, between rocks, between tree and pillar.
Inari Shrine, between crevice. Left from Tree, south from small crossroad after bridge.
FT back to Yuna Inari shrine(north from golden tree, top side waterfall) -> Haiku -> Temple run > Hidden altar(left frog statue)

splits.label: Komoda
splits.note:
White Color + Bamboo
Komoda - Bamboo, Haiku, Cricket, Fox Shrine(south from Golden Tree, between rocks)
Kashine Hills Inari Shrine - Unlock dragon shrine fast travel

splits.label: Ishikawa
splits.note:
Get The BOW!
After mission, Hotsprings, Shinto Shrine(2x hidden altar).
FT Back to Dojo - Hiyoshi 2 scrolls, Bamboo Strike, Hotsprings.

splits.label: Masako
splits.note:
Start from Hiyoshi, ride to waterfall, inari shrine.
Survivor camp Inari.
Fox Shrine Golden forest, Southwest entrance to the grove from tree.
